auth.label: User Token
auth.description: Brex user token sent as an Authorization: Bearer header. Create or revoke tokens in Brex Dashboard developer settings: https://dashboard.brex.com/settings/developer.

actions.name: get_budget
actions.description: Retrieve one Brex budget by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving one Brex resource.

accountId.description: The Brex account this budget belongs to.

anyOf.description: The budget description.
The parent budget ID.

ownerUserIds.description: User IDs of the budget owners.

anyOf.description: The date when the budget starts counting.
The date when the budget stops counting.
The amount in the smallest denomination of the currency.
The ISO 4217 currency code.
Whether the budget amount blocks spend.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Brex.
The raw object returned by Brex.

actions.name: get_company
actions.description: Retrieve the Brex company associated with the connected user token.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this Brex action.

legalName.description: The legal name of the company.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Brex.
The raw object returned by Brex.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Retrieve the Brex user associated with the connected user token.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this Brex action.

anyOf.description: The Brex user status.
The Brex user ID of this user's manager.
The Brex department ID assigned to the user.
The Brex location ID assigned to the user.
The Brex title ID assigned to the user.
Identifier displayed by the IDP or HR system.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Brex.
The raw object returned by Brex.

actions.name: get_expense
actions.description: Retrieve one Brex expense by ID.

expand.description: Brex expandable fields to include in the response.

loadCustomFields.description: Whether Brex should load custom fields for the expense.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving one Brex expense.

anyOf.description: The expense memo.
The expense status.
The expense payment status.
The Brex expense category.
The Brex user ID associated with the expense.
The Brex budget ID associated with the expense.
The merchant descriptor returned by Brex.
The time the purchase was made.
The last time the expense was updated.
The amount in the smallest denomination of the currency.
The ISO 4217 currency code.
The amount in the smallest denomination of the currency.
The ISO 4217 currency code.
The amount in the smallest denomination of the currency.
The ISO 4217 currency code.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Brex.
The raw object returned by Brex.

actions.name: list_budgets
actions.description: List Brex budgets with cursor pagination.

cursor.description: The Brex cursor returned from a previous list response.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return.

inputSchema.description: Input for a Brex paginated list request.

accountId.description: The Brex account this budget belongs to.

anyOf.description: The budget description.
The parent budget ID.

ownerUserIds.description: User IDs of the budget owners.

anyOf.description: The date when the budget starts counting.
The date when the budget stops counting.
The amount in the smallest denomination of the currency.
The ISO 4217 currency code.
Whether the budget amount blocks spend.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Brex.

items.description: Brex budgets returned for the requested page.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next page of budgets.
The cursor for the next page returned by Brex.

items.description: The raw object returned by Brex.
The raw items returned by Brex.

raw.description: The raw paginated response returned by Brex.

actions.name: list_card_accounts
actions.description: List Brex card accounts for the connected company.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this Brex action.

anyOf.description: The card account status.
The amount in the smallest denomination of the currency.
The ISO 4217 currency code.
The amount in the smallest denomination of the currency.
The ISO 4217 currency code.
The amount in the smallest denomination of the currency.
The ISO 4217 currency code.
The current statement period start date.
The current statement period end date.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Brex.

items.description: Brex card accounts returned by the API.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next page if Brex returns one.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Brex.

actions.name: list_expenses
actions.description: List Brex expenses with documented filters and cursor pagination.

cursor.description: The Brex cursor returned from a previous list response.

limit.description: Maximum number of expenses to return.

expand.description: Brex expandable fields to include in the response.

userIds.description: Brex user IDs to filter expenses by.

parentExpenseIds.description: Parent expense IDs to filter itemized expenses by.

budgetIds.description: Brex budget IDs to filter expenses by.

spendingEntityIds.description: Brex spending entity IDs to filter expenses by.

expenseType.description: Brex expense types to filter by.

status.description: Brex expense statuses to filter by.

paymentStatus.description: Brex expense payment statuses to filter by.

purchasedAtStart.description: Return expenses purchased on or after this RFC 3339 timestamp.

purchasedAtEnd.description: Return expenses purchased on or before this RFC 3339 timestamp.

updatedAtStart.description: Return expenses updated on or after this RFC 3339 timestamp.

updatedAtEnd.description: Return expenses updated on or before this RFC 3339 timestamp.

paymentPostedAtStart.description: Return expenses with payment posted on or after this RFC 3339 timestamp.

paymentPostedAtEnd.description: Return expenses with payment posted on or before this RFC 3339 timestamp.

loadCustomFields.description: Whether Brex should load custom fields for expenses.

anyOf.description: The expense memo.
The expense status.
The expense payment status.
The Brex expense category.
The Brex user ID associated with the expense.
The Brex budget ID associated with the expense.
The merchant descriptor returned by Brex.
The time the purchase was made.
The last time the expense was updated.
The amount in the smallest denomination of the currency.
The ISO 4217 currency code.
The amount in the smallest denomination of the currency.
The ISO 4217 currency code.
The amount in the smallest denomination of the currency.
The ISO 4217 currency code.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Brex.

items.description: Brex expenses returned for the requested page.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next page of expenses.
The cursor for the next page returned by Brex.

items.description: The raw object returned by Brex.
The raw items returned by Brex.

raw.description: The raw paginated response returned by Brex.

actions.name: list_primary_card_transactions
actions.description: List settled transactions across all Brex card accounts with optional user and date filters.

cursor.description: The Brex cursor returned from a previous list response.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return.

userIds.description: Brex user IDs to filter transactions by.

postedAtStart.description: Return transactions posted on or after this RFC 3339 timestamp.

expand.description: Brex expandable fields to include in the response.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Brex primary card transactions.

anyOf.description: The amount in the smallest denomination of the currency.
The ISO 4217 currency code.

initiatedAtDate.description: The transaction initiated date returned by Brex.

postedAtDate.description: The transaction posted date returned by Brex.

anyOf.description: The Brex transaction type.
The Brex card ID used for the transaction.
The Brex expense ID related to the transaction.
The merchant descriptor returned by Brex.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Brex.

items.description: Brex primary card transactions returned for the requested page.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next page of transactions.
The cursor for the next page returned by Brex.

items.description: The raw object returned by Brex.
The raw items returned by Brex.

raw.description: The raw paginated response returned by Brex.

outputSchema.description: Brex primary card transaction list output.

actions.name: list_users
actions.description: List Brex users with optional email, remote display ID, and cursor filters.

cursor.description: The Brex cursor returned from a previous list response.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return.

email.description: Filter users by a single email address.

remoteDisplayId.description: Filter users by one remote display ID.

expand.description: Brex expandable fields to include in the response.

anyOf.description: The Brex user status.
The Brex user ID of this user's manager.
The Brex department ID assigned to the user.
The Brex location ID assigned to the user.
The Brex title ID assigned to the user.
Identifier displayed by the IDP or HR system.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Brex.

items.description: Brex users returned for the requested page.

The cursor for the next page returned by Brex.
